title: Swing's Architectural Relationship with AWT
description: A visual breakdown showing how Swing components are built upon and extend the foundational AWT framework, highlighting the layered architecture and key dependencies.
relationships: Swing's JComponent extends AWT's Container class
All Swing components are lightweight and painted by the Java runtime, not the OS
Swing uses AWT's event model, layout managers, and graphics capabilities
Heavyweight AWT components have a direct native OS peer, while Swing components do not
